query: Research Daytona documentation and DeepAgents sandbox contracts before adding Daytona as a supported sandbox backend.
assumptions: DeepAgents integration must preserve the current DisposableSandbox contract and the no fake streaming rule for spawn.
The first implementation target is TypeScript, because deepagents is a TypeScript Nx workspace and Daytona publishes @daytona/sdk.
This report is stored in the repository under research because the user requested research artifacts there.

provider_config.web_sources: Daytona official docs, API docs pages, npm package metadata
provider_config.local_sources: packages/context sandbox source and tests, memory registry
